  {
    "title": "German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) – Rolling Cross-Section, Bundestag Election 2009",
    "description": "Daily campaign-period survey of eligible voters in Germany for the 2009 federal election, measuring vote intention, political behavior and attitudes, including issue positions related to conflict, security, peace, and international politics.",
    "host": "GESIS – Data Archive for the Social Sciences",
    "country": "Germany",
    "population": "Eligible voters (18+)",
    "year": 2009,
    "topics": ["Political behaviour and attitudes", "Conflict, security and peace", "International politics and organisations"]
  },
